_instructions.vendor: Fill in your company details. Leave any field blank ("") to omit it from the quote.
_instructions.line_items: Add one object per line item. Remove or duplicate the example rows as needed.
_instructions.freight: Flat freight charge in dollars, e.g. 150. Use 0 for none.
_instructions.tax_rate: Tax percentage, e.g. 8.5 for 8.5%. Use 0 for none.
